creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Steve Wills from comment #1)
It's weird but, I had installed grpc-1.43.2_1,2 (devel/grpc) instead of the grpc142-1.42.0_1 (devel/grpc142).

After I did:
pkg delete -yf grpc
portmaster rubygem-grpc142
service gitlab-ce restart

No more coredumps of the ruby…
Probably I found core of the issue on my side.
Check: do you have installed correct versions of the grpc and rubygem-grpc?
